description: Configure WooCommerce product settings to enable reviews and require star ratings. Add a 5-star review to 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' with the text: 'Amazing sound quality and the noise cancellation is top-notch. Battery lasts all week with daily use.' Also, add a 4-star review to 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' with the text: 'Very soft and comfortable fabric. Runs slightly large so consider sizing down.' Ensure both reviews are submitted and visible on the storefront.
